Infectum.turoyo: korəz aʕlayye u=taʕlo kul yawm-d-ḥušabo, k-omər: lo=quṭlitu w lo=zonetu 97; prs 226/20; w-hiye gd-oṯe-wa gd-omar-wa ono k-aṯino, b-riše d-i=šato, wayaxut b-u=ʕeḏo, d-korazno aʕlayxu, u=dino d-i=ṭayuṯo mək=k-omər ‘And he (officer, m.) used to come and say:
translations: auch pflegte ihnen der Fuchs jeden Sonntag zu predigen:
I have come – (and that was on the New Year day or on the feast days) – to preach to you what the religion of Islam says
